message:
fix(time/wheel): clamp tick diff in u64 before narrowing to usize

In TimerWheel's slot promotion paths (promote_coalescing_window_entries
and the symmetric drain helper), the difference between
level_tick_boundary and level_tick_current was being narrowed to usize
*before* being compared against SLOTS_PER_LEVEL.  On 32-bit targets a
sufficiently large u64 difference would silently truncate the high
bits and produce a usize value below SLOTS_PER_LEVEL, bypassing the
clamp and walking past the end of the slot array.

Fix: keep the difference as u64, clamp against SLOTS_PER_LEVEL as u64,
and only narrow to usize after the clamp branch is chosen.  Both call
sites use the same pattern; the second carries a back-reference comment
to the first so the rationale is not lost on either.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
